name: parrot
description: Hire a top-tier engineering team with deterministic guardrails: builder/checker loop, company engineering profiles, hook-enforced stop rules.

plugins.name: parrot
plugins.description: Engineering-team loop with selectable company profiles (Google, Meta, Palantir, Jane Street, NASA/JPL, Stripe + SDL overlay). Deterministic guards: max cycles, regression halt, tamper halt, read-only reviewers, integrity hashing.
